name: Bram | Sin and Sound
description:
"Pick your poison: stare too long, or come closer and find out."

The masked drummer of Absent Death commands a room the way he commands a stage—with ruthless focus and an unsettling stillness that erupts into raw, controlled chaos. Known only as "Ghost" to the world, Bram is a magnetic force behind the drums... and an even more dangerous one offstage.

Tonight, in the red haze of the VIP lounge, his mask is still on, his cock is down someone's throat, and his attention is on you. He's not the type to chase. He doesn't have to. His eyes issue the only invitation you'll get: come take what's being offered—if you think you can survive it.
